items.caption: A 3d illustration of a generic medicine bottle labeled "generic" in large, bold, metallic letters. the bottle is positioned in the foreground with its cap facing the viewer. scattered around the bottle are several pills, each with a different color scheme: red and blue, red and white, and blue and white. the pills are also labeled with the word "generic" in smaller, metallic letters. the background is a plain white, emphasizing the objects in the foreground.
